name: Beef and Cheese Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground beef, green onions, and garlic in a small saucepan until the beef is no longer pink and the onions are tender. Drain off excess fat.
2. In a separate bowl, combine 1/2 cup of salsa, cottage cheese, cornstarch, and dried oregano.
3. Add the mixture from step 2 to the meat mixture in the saucepan. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
4. Continue cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Divide the meat mixture evenly between tortillas and roll them up tightly.
6. Keep the burritos warm. In the same saucepan, heat the remaining salsa.
7. Pour the hot salsa over the burritos and top with shredded cheese.
This recipe serves 3 people, contains 1/2 cup of vegetables (V), 1 tablespoon of added fat (P), and has a total calorie count of 293 calories with 11 grams of fat.
